---
title: "Caleb Mogyabiyedom"
image: photo.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/caleb-mogyabiyedom-0a3715275/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/elevenw11se
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:koficaleb11@gmail.com
---

## **Caleb Mogyabiyedom**

### *Economics × Data Science × Financial Markets*

> I use data to analyze markets, evaluate investments, and uncover insights—especially in emerging economies.


👉 Explore my work in the **Data Viz** tab above.
